body: {"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"Programmatic decomposition path (the action that fans a too-large bead into children) MUST NOT add the parent as a dep. Existing action templates / system prompts are audited and amended; one golden e2e test (decompose_does_not_self_dep) creates a bead with N children and asserts every child's deps set excludes the parent.","coverage":"covered by child 1: Reject bead dep edges that re-introduce the parent or any ancestor: part: part 1"},{"parent_ac":"'ddx bead doctor' (existing subcommand) gains a check 'parent_ancestor_in_deps' that scans the tracker, lists violating beads, and (with --fix) removes the offending edges. Output is stable / scriptable. Test: ddx_doctor_detects_and_repairs_back_edge.","coverage":"covered by child 2: Reject bead dep edges that re-introduce the parent or any ancestor: part: part 2"},{"parent_ac":"ddx work no-progress remediation: when an attempted bead's outcome is 'mixed_commit_and_no_changes_rationale' AND any freshly-created child carries the attempted bead in its deps, ddx auto-emits an 'operator_attention' event with reason 'parent_back_edge' and stops re-claiming that bead. (Today it loops indefinitely.) Test: ddx_work_halts_on_parent_back_edge.","coverage":"covered by child 2: Reject bead dep edges that re-introduce the parent or any ancestor: part: part 2"},{"parent_ac":"cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./... passes.","coverage":"covered by child 3: Reject bead dep edges that re-introduce the parent or any ancestor: part: part 3"},{"parent_ac":"lefthook run pre-commit passes.","coverage":"covered by child 3: Reject bead dep edges that re-introduce the parent or any ancestor: part: part 3"}],"child_ids":["ddx-db72876d","ddx-8a8bf714","ddx-3892c623"],"rationale":"deterministic fallback split after agent decomposer returned dispatch error: lifecycle dispatch: project root mutation rejected (changed existing dirty paths: .ddx/attachments/ddx-d2e3bc51/events.jsonl, .ddx/beads.jsonl, .ddx/metrics/attempts.jsonl, .ddx/metrics/locks.jsonl)"}

summary: closed as dead-intermediate bead (all children closed, execution-eligible=false)
